zh.lifeSummary: Sir Edward de Warenne是John de Warenne和Joan de Port的兒子，出生。他和Maude de Skeyton至少有1個兒子。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir Edward de Warenne是John de Warenne和Joan de Port的儿子，出生。他和Maude de Skeyton至少有1个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: Sir Edward de Warenne was born as the son of John de Warenne and Joan de Port. He had at least 1 son with Maude de Skeyton.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir Edward de Warenne est né, fils de John de Warenne et Joan de Port. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Maude de Skeyton.

de.lifeSummary: Sir Edward de Warenne wurde, als Sohn von John de Warenne und Joan de Port geboren. Er hatte mit Maude de Skeyton mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Sir Edward de Warenne è nato il come figlio di John de Warenne e Joan de Port. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Maude de Skeyton.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Edward de WarenneはJohn de WarenneとJoan de Portの息子として生まれた。彼はMaude de Skeytonとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Edward de Warenne(은)는 John de Warenne(와)과 Joan de Port의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Maude de Skeyton(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sir Edward de Warenne nasceu filho de John de Warenne e Joan de Port. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Maude de Skeyton.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir Edward de Warenne родился. Его родителей звали John de Warenne и Joan de Port. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Maude de Skeyton.

es.lifeSummary: Sir Edward de Warenne nació como hijo de John de Warenne y Joan de Port. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Maude de Skeyton.
